scenarios.name: US vs Russia (Full Exchange)
scenarios.description: Princeton Plan A-style escalation: counterforce then countervalue. ~495 warheads.

scenarios.name: Russia vs NATO + UK/FR Retaliation
scenarios.description: Russian strike on NATO; UK Trident & French M51 fire back at Russia.

scenarios.name: US vs China
scenarios.description: Bilateral exchange: US strikes Chinese nuclear forces + cities, China retaliates.

scenarios.name: Counterforce Only (US-Russia)
scenarios.description: Military/nuclear targets only - no cities struck. "Limited" exchange.

scenarios.name: Global Thermonuclear War
scenarios.description: US + NATO + UK + France vs Russia + China. Every warhead flies. ~708 total.

scenarios.name: Russian First Strike on US
scenarios.description: Russia launches surprise counterforce strike. US has no time to launch on warning.

scenarios.name: US First Strike on Russia
scenarios.description: US launches surprise counterforce strike on Russian nuclear forces.
